meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solve Debugging Roadblocks Fast
content.seo_description: Stop losing hours to bugs. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching to solve complex code issues using Antigravity and Claude Code. Advanced guide.
content.answer_block: When your code hits an impenetrable wall, don't burn billable hours manually tracing errors. Pivot your workflow by pitching the client on an 'AI-Assisted Audit' phase. Use Antigravity to map architectural bottlenecks and Claude Code to execute structural fixes, turning a debugging nightmare into a high-value, transparent technical delivery.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text at 3:00 AM, the deadline is looming, and the production environment is behaving like a haunted house. Every minute spent chasing a memory leak or an obscure async race condition is a minute you aren't building, scaling, or getting paid. The pressure to ship is immense, and your client expects a wizard, not a debugger stuck in a loop.

The secret isn't better debugging skills; it's better positioning. By framing your debugging process as a strategic 'Code Integrity Audit,' you transform a technical failure into a premium service. Using advanced AI orchestration tools, you can isolate, diagnose, and resolve defects at machine speed, shifting your role from a reactive coder to a proactive architectural consultant.

steps.title: Perform an AI-Powered Architectural Audit
steps.description: Before touching the code, use Antigravity to map the dependencies and identify high-entropy zones where bugs are likely hiding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this repository. Identify the top three modules with the highest cyclomatic complexity and potential memory leaks. Provide a dependency graph highlighting circular references.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ls --include-hidden | grep 'src/' | xargs claude analyze --depth 2

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with Precise Context
steps.description: Feed specific error logs into Claude Code to create a sandbox environment that reproduces the failure state without affecting production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction test case for the following error stack trace: [PASTE STACK TRACE]. Focus on isolating the database connection pool logic.

steps.title: Synthesize a Fix via Multi-Agent Review
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate a pull request that addresses the root cause while maintaining backward compatibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the proposed fix for the memory leak. Ensure it adheres to our existing architectural patterns and suggest any necessary performance optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude patch --message 'Fix memory leak in connection pool' --dry-run

steps.title: Validate and Stress-Test
steps.description: Automate the verification process to ensure the bug is dead and no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of regression tests that specifically target the fixed module. Include edge cases for high-concurrency scenarios.

steps.title: Pitch the 'Code Health' Deliverable
steps.description: Present the fix to your client as a comprehensive 'Code Health Report', highlighting the automated audit and the robust fix implemented.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the technical debt reduction achieved by this fix. Draft a professional email update for a non-technical client emphasizing the long-term stability benefits.

pro_tips: Always maintain a clean 'debug-log' folder in your repo that Claude Code can index for future pattern recognition.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Dependency Health Scores'—clients love seeing data-backed proof that your code is high quality.
Never fix in production; use Claude Code to push to a staging branch, verify, and merge, keeping your git history pristine.
If you're stuck on a logic bug, ask Claude Code to 'explain the state transition' of the affected function to find hidden side effects.
Position your AI-assisted debugging as a 'Technical Debt Sprint' to justify additional billable hours for maintenance work.
content.next_steps: After resolving the immediate issue, integrate these AI workflows into your CI/CD pipeline to ensure automated auditing for every future PR.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start building the future of your freelance career with professional-grade AI tools. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
